raw_model_answer:
STEP 1: Remove contaminated clothing and shoes immediately.
STEP 2: Wash skin thoroughly with plenty of soap and water for 15-20 minutes.
STEP 3: Rinse eyes with clean water if any splash occurred.
DO NOT: Use harsh scrubbing brushes or solvents.
ESCALATE: Seek medical attention if irritation persists or systemic symptoms appear. Provide the product label/SDS to the doctor.

immediate_steps: Remove contaminated clothing and shoes immediately.
Wash skin thoroughly with plenty of soap and water for 15-20 minutes.
Rinse eyes with clean water if any splash occurred.
do_not_do: Use harsh scrubbing brushes or solvents.
escalate_when: Seek medical attention if irritation persists or systemic symptoms appear. Provide the product label/SDS to the doctor.
